title: Format Conversation Log UI
description: Improve formatting of the Conversation Log to display the user's text and agent responses separately. Ensure that each agent response is rendered inside its own sub-container/boundary box as it is streaming, clearly separating different actions and responses. All agent responses must be wrapped and rendered using a Markdown renderer.
result: Replaced log TextView with layout_chat_container LinearLayout displaying separate user and agent bubbles, using styled markdown html renderer with text typing animation.
